valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Mon 20 Apr 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Tue 21 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: High Southeast Iceland 1029 expected north of Southeast Iceland 1039 by 1800 Monday. New low expected Trafalgar 1000 by same time. Low Viking 1019 losing its identity

Viking.text:
Wind
In southwest, cyclonic 4, becoming southeasterly 4 to 6, backing northeasterly 4 later. In northeast, easterly becoming variable, 2 to 4, becoming northerly 4 later.
Sea state
Moderate.
Weather
In southwest, showers. In northeast, fog patches.
Visibility
In southwest, good, occasionally poor. In northeast, good, occasionally very poor.
